title: Bridge Essay: Designs on consciousness: literature and predictive processing.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent-arising** (Phase 6) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Dependent-arising to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Designs on consciousness: literature and predictive processing.** — Philos Trans R Soc Lond B Biol Sci. PMID: 38104606. DOI: 10.1098/rstb.2022.0423. Predictive processing is arecent approach in cognitive science that describes the brain as an engine of probabilistic hierarchical inference. Initially proposed as ageneral theory of brain function, predictive processing has recently been expanding to account for questions of consciousness in philosophy and neuroscience.
